tickets.title: Cannot reset password
tickets.description: User reports password reset email never arrives. Checked spam folder.

tickets.title: Printer offline in Building B
tickets.description: Shared printer shows offline since Monday morning.

tickets.title: VPN disconnects every hour
tickets.description: Remote staff lose VPN connection approximately every 60 minutes.

tickets.title: Request monitor arm
tickets.description: Employee needs ergonomic monitor arm for dual-screen setup.

tickets.title: Duplicate invoice in billing portal
tickets.description: Customer sees two identical invoices for March subscription.

tickets.title: Mobile app crashes on login
tickets.description: iOS app version 3.2 crashes immediately after entering credentials.

comments.message: Verified SMTP relay is accepting messages. Checking user mailbox quota.
Customer confirmed email address is correct.
Restarted print spooler on the server. Monitoring.
Updated VPN client policy timeout from 60 to 480 minutes.
Confirmed fix with two remote users.
Reproduced on iOS 17.4. Escalating to mobile team.
